title: Use full-color XOROOTS logo in header and a subtle watermark variant for authenticated scrolling background

requirements.text: Add the uploaded XOROOTS logo image to the frontend static assets so the full-color logo is served from the exact path referenced by BRANDING.logo.src: `/assets/generated/xoroots-logo.dim_300x100.png`.

quotes: Use full‑color in header and a subtle transparent watermark in background

acceptanceCriteria: `frontend/public/assets/generated/xoroots-logo.dim_300x100.png` exists and loads in the browser at `/assets/generated/xoroots-logo.dim_300x100.png`.
`BrandLogo` renders the image (not the text fallback) when the asset is present.

requirements.text: Create and use a separate subtle transparent watermark-style variant of the XOROOTS logo for the authenticated scrolling background, while keeping the header logo full-color.

quotes: Use full‑color in header and a subtle transparent watermark in background

acceptanceCriteria: A second static image asset exists at `frontend/public/assets/generated/xoroots-logo-watermark.dim_300x100.png` and loads in the browser at `/assets/generated/xoroots-logo-watermark.dim_300x100.png`.
The authenticated scrolling background uses `/assets/generated/xoroots-logo-watermark.dim_300x100.png` (not the full-color header logo asset).
The header continues to render the full-color logo using `BRANDING.logo.src` unchanged.

requirements.text: Update the authenticated scrolling logo background styling so the watermark remains subtle and readable behind content in both light and dark themes (no interaction blocking).

quotes: Use full‑color in header and a subtle transparent watermark in background

acceptanceCriteria: Background remains behind dashboard content (content stays above it) and does not capture pointer events.
Watermark opacity remains subtle in both themes (light and dark) and does not reduce text readability.
Scrolling animation remains continuous on authenticated pages only and does not appear on the logged-out landing page.

constraints: Do not edit files under `frontend/src/components/ui` (compose them instead).
Do not edit any paths listed in `frontend.immutablePaths` in SYSTEM_CONTEXT.
Keep backend as a single Motoko actor (no new backend services).
Keep `BRANDING.logo.src` pointing to `/assets/generated/xoroots-logo.dim_300x100.png` so the header uses the full-color asset consistently.
nonGoals: Adding new dashboard features or altering existing dashboard/landing page behavior beyond the watermark asset/style change.
Introducing any backend storage or schema changes for branding assets.

required: Full-color XOROOTS logo on a transparent background, tightly framed for a wide banner (xoroots-logo.dim_300x100.png, 300x100)
Grayscale/monochrome XOROOTS logo on a transparent background with a soft, watermark look (xoroots-logo-watermark.dim_300x100.png, 300x100)
